entry.title: APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-APX-1E-D1) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-APX-1E-D1 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: APEX RD XPLR

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version  before installing this Device Firmware Update.   This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-APX-1E-D1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-APX-1E-D1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: APEX RD XPLR

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: APEX CONTROLLER (L) (ED-APX-D1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
APEX CONTROLLER (L) ED-APX-D1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: Apex ED (L)

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-APX-1E-D1) — firmware 2.49.6
entry.summary:
APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-APX-1E-D1 — firmware 2.49.6

Part: APEX RD XPLR

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. FW 2.49.6 contains improvements in the support and verification of the Firmware during the factory production of the Rear Derailleur.

Released: 2024-10-05

entry.title: APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-APX-1E-D1) — firmware 2.49.4
entry.summary:
APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-APX-1E-D1 — firmware 2.49.4

Part: APEX RD XPLR

Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates, and reliability improvements

Released: 2024-08-14

entry.title: APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T (RD-APX-1E-D1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
APEX RD XPLR MAX 44T RD-APX-1E-D1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: APEX RD XPLR

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.summary:

entry.title: APEX CONTROLLER (L) (ED-APX-D1) — firmware 2.46.2
entry.summary:
APEX CONTROLLER (L) ED-APX-D1 — firmware 2.46.2

Part: Apex ED (L)

Platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements. Shifter AXS button indicates state of charge (SoC).

Released: 2023-09-21
